arts.ttl: Maginficent Mainz add to Dortmund's away blues
arts.sum: Mainz capitalised on Emre Can's early dismissal to claim their first home win of the season with a dominant showing that extends Dortmund's poor away run, which now stretches to four losses in a row on their travels. Jae-sung Lee rises high to head home Mainz's opening goal, giving them a deserved lead - Alex Grimm

arts.ttl: Barcelona 'hatch swap deal plan' to beat Chelsea to Karim Adeyemi transfer next summer
arts.sum: Barcelona could offer Spanish attacker Ferran Torres to Borussia Dortmund as part of a potential deal for Karim Adeyemi, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Match Thread: Borussia Dortmund Head to Mainz in Search of Points
arts.sum: Streaming: ESPN+ (USA) and Sky Go (Germany) Use those and don’t share any illegal streams in the comments.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund predicted XI vs Mainz 05: Nuri Şahin to avoid risk taking
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund will continue to be without several key players as they look to win successive games in the Bundesliga heading into the international break. Ahead of today’s game against…

arts.ttl: Liverpool disadvantaged in two-way race to sign Dortmund star as Barcelona prepare swap offer
arts.sum: Liverpool have been dealt a potential blow in pursuit of Borussia Dortmund’s Karim Adeyemi. The Reds have been linked with the 22-year-old for quite some time with speculation they could approach Dortmund over a deal in the summer. However, Arne Slot’s chances of signing the rapid wide-forward have been dented after Barcelona joined the running. arts.ttl: Dortmund unhappy with tight Bundesliga schedule: "Difficult for us to accept"
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund have been left frustrated by the recently announced Bundesliga fixture list.

arts.ttl: Mainz vs Borussia Dortmund preview: Schwarzgelben chase third straight win
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund manager Nuri Sahin aims for his team to secure a third straight victory as they head to Mewa Arena this Saturday to face Mainz 05 in their 10th Bundesliga match of the season.

arts.ttl: Sahin gives injury update on depleted Dortmund squad
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund coach Nuri Sahin has given an update on his injury-hit squad ahead of this weekend's trip to Mainz.
Week 10 of the Bundesliga promises to serve up plenty of entertainment and Tom McGarry has provided a score prediction for each of the nine games.

arts.ttl: Preview: Mainz 05 vs. Borussia Dortmund - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Mainz 05 and Borussia Dortmund, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
